title: Unclear Service or Module Boundaries
summary: The system does not clearly define what responsibility belongs to each component.
inspection_goal: Find overlap, ambiguous ownership, and architectural regions where responsibilities appear smeared across multiple components.
primary_signals: Frequent cross-boundary dependencies with no clear dominant owner
Clusters with mixed responsibilities or weak internal coherence
Modules that appear in many unrelated dependency neighborhoods
Similar domain concepts implemented in multiple places
inspection_questions: Do components have clear and singular responsibilities?
Which modules appear to overlap in domain scope?
Are ownership boundaries aligned with dependency boundaries?
Where does the graph suggest a smeared or accidental boundary?
evidence_to_collect: Cluster membership and cross-cluster edge counts
Context summaries from code or folder naming
Repeated dependency motifs across neighboring modules
recommendation_patterns: Merge duplicated domain logic behind one clear owner
Split mixed-boundary components along domain lines
Document and enforce explicit interface boundaries

severity_guidance.high: Core domains overlap heavily and ownership is ambiguous.
severity_guidance.medium: Boundary confusion exists in a few clusters or services.
severity_guidance.low: Most boundaries are clear, with only localized ambiguity.
